checks.description: clk must be a 1‑bit scalar output and remain a single‑bit value throughout observation.
notes: Width and scalarity are verified; value content (0/1/X/Z) is allowed per contract policy.
checks.pass_condition: The signal width of clk is exactly 1 and it is not a vector or packed array.
checks.trigger_condition: Evaluated at time zero after power‑up and again after any reset release.
